target.rawSql: SELECT min(Timestamp) AS time, max(addNanoseconds(Timestamp, Duration)) AS timeEnd, concat('trace ', '${trace_id}') AS text FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE TraceId = '${trace_id}'

query.rawSql: SELECT TraceId AS __value, concat(toString(Timestamp), '  ', SpanAttributes['scenario_name'], '  ', toString(round(Duration/1e9, 1)), 's') AS __text FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE SpanAttributes['tiny_gym.kind'] = 'scenario' ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 30

list.name: metric
list.label: Metric
list.query: GPU VRAM used (MB) : DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED, GPU SM utilization (%) : DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL, GPU Power (W) : DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE, GPU Temperature (°C) : DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP, sglang KV cache used (tokens) : sglang_kv_used_tokens, sglang KV cache available (tokens) : sglang_kv_available_tokens, sglang Running requests : sglang_num_running_reqs, sglang Queued requests : sglang_num_queue_reqs, sglang Generation throughput (tok/s) : sglang_gen_throughput, sglang Cache hit rate : sglang_cache_hit_rate, sglang Utilization : sglang_utilization, Host CPU utilization (by state) : system.cpu.utilization, Host RAM utilization : system.memory.utilization, Host Load 1m : system.cpu.load_average.1m, Host Load 5m : system.cpu.load_average.5m, Per-PID GPU VRAM (bytes) : gpu_process_memory_bytes, Per-PID CPU utilization : process.cpu.utilization, Per-PID RAM utilization : process.memory.utilization

panels.title: Recent scenario runs (click TraceId → zoom dashboard + select that trace)

value.title: Zoom dashboard to this exact trace window

targets.rawSql: SELECT Timestamp AS time, SpanAttributes['scenario_name'] AS scenario, round(Duration/1e9, 2) AS duration_s, toInt64OrNull(SpanAttributes['n_llm_calls']) AS n_llm, toInt64OrNull(SpanAttributes['n_tool_calls']) AS n_tool, toInt64OrNull(SpanAttributes['prompt_tokens']) AS prompt_tok, toInt64OrNull(SpanAttributes['completion_tokens']) AS completion_tok, toInt64OrNull(SpanAttributes['gpu.mem_delta_mb']) AS vram_delta_mb, toInt64OrNull(SpanAttributes['mem.rss_delta_mb']) AS rss_delta_mb, TraceId, toInt64(toUnixTimestamp64Milli(Timestamp)) AS zoom_from_ms, toInt64(toUnixTimestamp64Milli(addNanoseconds(Timestamp, Duration))) AS zoom_to_ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE SpanAttributes['tiny_gym.kind'] = 'scenario' ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, multiIf(Attributes['pid'] != '', concat('pid', Attributes['pid'], ' ', substring(Attributes['process_name'], 1, 30)), ResourceAttributes['process.pid'] != '' AND Attributes['state'] != '', concat('pid', ResourceAttributes['process.pid'], ' ', Attributes['state']), ResourceAttributes['process.pid'] != '', concat('pid', ResourceAttributes['process.pid'], ' ', ResourceAttributes['process.executable.name']), Attributes['state'] != '', Attributes['state'], Attributes['gpu'] != '', concat('gpu', Attributes['gpu']), MetricName) AS series, Value FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE MetricName = '${metric}' AND TimeUnix BETWEEN (SELECT min(Timestamp) FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE TraceId = '${trace_id}') AND (SELECT max(addNanoseconds(Timestamp, Duration)) FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE TraceId = '${trace_id}') ORDER BY time
